

## population - private workers % - House

- Figures: `figs/[TYPE]/m-populationworkers_private-percent-House-[1:4].png`

```{r m-populationworkers_private-percent-House}
#| fig-show: "hold"
#| out-width: "50%"
#| fig-height: 4.5
#| fig-cap: "Per Year"
#| fig-subcap: 
#|   - "Model 1: Cross Sectional"
#|   - "Model 2: full Cross Sectional"



# cross-sectional 
m_population_percent_workers_private_House_cross <- fenegbin (
  perYear ~ 
    population_m + 
    #percent_workers_federal + 
    percent_workers_private_sector + 
    #percent_workers_self_employed + 
    #percent_#workers_nonprofit + 
    percent_workers_government + 
    percent_education_bachelor_or_higher +
    percent_public_assistance_or_snap_households  | 
    Year_x_Agency,
  cluster = "Legislator", 
  data = data_member |> filter(chamber=="House") )

if(testing){modelsummary::modelsummary(m_population_percent_workers_private_House_cross, gof_omit = "R.*", starts = T, stars = T, coef_omit = coef_omit)}

coefplot(m_population_percent_workers_private_House_cross, horiz = T, drop = "(Intercept)") 



# 3
m_population_percent_workers_private_House_full_cross <-fenegbin (
  perYear ~ 
    population_m + 
    #percent_workers_federal + 
    percent_workers_private_sector + 
    #percent_workers_self_employed + 
    #percent_#workers_nonprofit + 
    percent_workers_government + 
    percent_education_bachelor_or_higher +
    percent_public_assistance_or_snap_households + 
    chair + 
    ranking_minority + 
    prestige + 
    oversight +  
    experience + 
    majority + presidents_party | 
    Year_x_Agency, 
  cluster = "Legislator", 
  data = data_member |> filter(chamber=="House") )

if(testing){modelsummary::modelsummary(m_population_percent_workers_private_House_full_cross, gof_omit = "R.*", starts = T, coef_omit = coef_omit)}
coefplot(m_population_percent_workers_private_House_full_cross, horiz = T, drop = ".theta") 

```


### Table - population 

```{r m-population_percentworkers_private-House-models}
models_populationworkers_private <- list(
  "(1)" = m_population_percent_workers_private_House_cross,
  "(3)" =  m_population_percent_workers_private_House_full_cross)

rows <- tibble(
  term = c("Dependent Variable"),
  `(1)` = c("Count"),
  `(3)` = c("Count"))

# call coefs
attr(rows, 'position') <- c(0)

# HTML
modelsummary(models_populationworkers_private, 
             title = "", 
             notes = list("Robust standard errors in parentheses, clustered by legislator."))

beta_cross <- betas(m_population_percent_workers_private_House_cross)
se_cross <- standard_errors(m_population_percent_workers_private_House_cross)
```
